# QMD 向量化索引

**更新时间**: 2026-03-31 21:23:00
**模式**: CPU

---

## 📚 知识库文件

- [📚 知识库索引](knowledge/KNOWLEDGE-INDEX.md)
- [内容策略指南](knowledge/content-creation/content-strategy/内容策略指南.md)
- [公众号运营指南](knowledge/content-creation/wechat-public/公众号运营指南.md)
- [视频创作指南](knowledge/content-creation/video-creation/视频创作指南.md)
- [多智能体协作最佳实践](knowledge/multi-agent-collaboration/MULTI_AGENT_BEST_PRACTICES.md)
- [PlantUML 图表创建完整指南](knowledge/tools/plantuml-guide.md)
- [OpenClaw Sessions API 文档](knowledge/tools/openclaw-sessions-api.md)
- [旅行客公共服务平台 - 统计看板测试用例](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/traveler-platform/test-cases/统计看板测试用例.md)
- [旅行客公共服务平台测试准备](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/traveler-platform/test-plans/测试准备.md)
- [旅行客公共服务平台 - 测试项目](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/traveler-platform/README.md)
- [第一轮测试报告](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/traveler-platform/test-reports/第一轮测试报告-20260303.md)
- [测试项目知识库使用指南](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/使用指南.md)
- [测试项目知识库](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/README.md)
- [测试项目索引](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/PROJECT-INDEX.md)
- [[项目名称] - 测试项目](knowledge/software-testing/testing-projects/PROJECT-TEMPLATE.md)
- [测试用例设计与三端测试方案完整指南](knowledge/software-testing/测试用例设计与三端测试方案.md)
- [测试管理指南](knowledge/software-testing/test-management/测试管理指南.md)
- [移动应用测试知识库](knowledge/software-testing/mobile-testing/移动应用测试完整指南.md)
- [测试能力扩展计划 - 移动端与桌面端](knowledge/software-testing/mobile-testing/测试能力扩展计划-移动端与桌面端.md)
- [测试进阶工具链 - 搜索效果测试报告](knowledge/software-testing/test-tools/搜索测试报告.md)
- [测试工具指南](knowledge/software-testing/test-tools/测试工具指南.md)
- [测试知识库初始化](knowledge/software-testing/test-tools/test-document.md)
- [测试进阶工具链 - 现代化测试能力框架](knowledge/software-testing/test-tools/测试进阶工具链.md)
- [自动化测试指南](knowledge/software-testing/test-automation/自动化测试指南.md)
- [知识库扩展总结（2026-03-03深夜）](knowledge/software-testing/知识库扩展总结-20260303.md)
- [桌面应用测试知识库](knowledge/software-testing/desktop-testing/桌面应用测试完整指南.md)
- [外包项目管理体系位置分析](knowledge/outsourcing-management/位置分析-测试领域vs独立目录.md)
- [平台操作指南](knowledge/outsourcing-management/PLATFORM-GUIDE.md)
- [外包项目管理体系 - 总结文档](knowledge/outsourcing-management/SUMMARY.md)
- [知识库最终结构（方案2）](knowledge/outsourcing-management/最终结构说明.md)
- [猪八戒平台资料完善指南](knowledge/outsourcing-management/猪八戒资料完善指南.md)
- [竞标文档模板](knowledge/outsourcing-management/BIDDING-TEMPLATE.md)
- [外包项目管理体系](knowledge/outsourcing-management/README.md)
- [项目评估工具](knowledge/outsourcing-management/PROJECT-EVALUATION.md)
- [京东薅羊毛系统v2.3.0升级总结](knowledge/ai-system-design/2026-03-05-jd-system-upgrade.md)
- [OpenClaw 扩展能力完整指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/openclaw-extensions-guide.md)
- [薅羊毛系统优化与部署指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/wool-gathering-optimization-guide.md)
- [PlantUML图表创建完整指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/PlantUML图表创建完整指南.md)
- [OpenClaw 系统架构深度理解](knowledge/ai-system-design/openclaw-architecture.md)
- [2026-03-04 学习总结](knowledge/ai-system-design/2026-03-04-学习总结.md)
- [上下文监控最佳实践](knowledge/ai-system-design/context-monitoring-best-practices.md)
- [OpenClaw Skills 安装与使用完整指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/OpenClaw-Skills使用指南.md)
- [OpenClaw Skills 完整指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/openclaw-skills-guide.md)
- [AI自动化测试实战指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/AI自动化测试实战指南.md)
- [OpenClaw + Playwright 网页爬取能力](knowledge/ai-system-design/OpenClaw-Playwright网页爬取.md)
- [OpenClaw + Playwright 网页爬取实战指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/openclaw-playwright-guide.md)
- [OpenClaw Skills 安装与使用完整指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/OpenClaw-Skills使用指南-完整版.md)
- [AIHubMix 免费模型接入指南](knowledge/ai-system-design/aihubmix-free-models-guide.md)
- [tscircuit 生态开发经验](knowledge/bounty/references/tscircuit-ecosystem-lessons.md)
- [GitHub Bounty Hunter 实现文档](knowledge/bounty/references/github-bounty-hunter-implementation.md)
- [Bounty 过滤规则](knowledge/bounty/strategies/filters.md)
- [自动工作流程策略](knowledge/bounty/strategies/auto-workflow.md)
- [GitHub 搜索策略](knowledge/bounty/strategies/github-search.md)
- [Bounty 价值评估](knowledge/bounty/strategies/scoring.md)
- [SECURITY.md 精简模板](knowledge/bounty/security-templates/minimal.md)
- [SECURITY.md 企业级模板](knowledge/bounty/security-templates/enterprise.md)
- [SECURITY.md 标准模板](knowledge/bounty/security-templates/standard.md)
- [Bounty 知识库](knowledge/bounty/README.md)
- [RustChain 付款流程](knowledge/bounty/platform-specific/rustchain-payment-flow.md)
- [已完成 Bounty 记录](knowledge/bounty/history/completed.md)
- [Bounty 经验教训](knowledge/bounty/history/lessons.md)
- [Bounty 任务质量评估标准 v2.0](knowledge/bounty/standards/quality-assessment-v2.md)
- [🌍 外贸知识库](knowledge/trade/README.md)
- [🚢 出口流程详解](knowledge/trade/export-process.md)
- [📧 外贸邮件模板](knowledge/trade/email-templates.md)
- [📦 Incoterms 2020 - 国际贸易术语](knowledge/trade/incoterms-2020.md)
- [📕 小红书种草运营方案](knowledge/trade/xiaohongshu-strategy.md)
- [知识体系框架](knowledge/KNOWLEDGE_FRAMEWORK.md)
- [QMD 知识库搜索工具使用指南](knowledge/SEARCH-GUIDE.md)
- [项目规划指南](knowledge/project-management/project-planning/项目规划指南.md)
- [敏捷项目管理方法论](knowledge/project-management/agile-methodology/敏捷项目管理方法论.md)
- [敏捷项目管理实战指南](knowledge/project-management/agile-methodology/敏捷项目管理实战指南.md)
- [PMP认证指南](knowledge/project-management/pmp-certification/PMP认证指南.md)
- [PMP认证完整指南](knowledge/project-management/pmp-certification/PMP认证完整指南.md)
- [项目管理与测试结合实践指南](knowledge/project-management/项目管理与测试结合实践指南.md)
- [Shubham文件系统记忆方法论](knowledge/articles/2026-03-22-shubham-file-system-memory.md)
- [OpenClaw 全套核心提示词中文完整版](knowledge/articles/general/OpenClaw 全套核心提示词中文完整版_1773136787731.md)
- [2026-03-04 学习总结](knowledge/articles/general/2026-03-04-学习总结.md)
- [OpenClaw核心学习资料大全：从安装到精通，掌握AI时代最强生产力工具](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat_article_20260310_161403.md)
- [让龙虾🦞Openclaw自己去赚钱](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat-article-2026-03-10.md)
- [腾讯悄咪咪做了个 QClaw，用微信就能跟龙虾对话了！](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat_腾讯悄咪咪做了个_QClaw_用微信就能跟龙虾对话了_.md)
- [OpenClaw极速使用：技能与插件](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat_OpenClaw极速使用_技能与插件_20260310_170918.md)
- [没理由不用 Google Antigravity 了，不仅额度用不完，现在还支持 Skill 了！](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat_article_没理由不用 Google Antigravity 了，不仅额度用不完，现在还支持 Skill 了！_2026-03-10T08-40-53-693Z.md)
- [我的 OpenClaw Token 账单降了72%，只因装了这个插件](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat-article-1773134120130.md)
- [别买 API 了！ChatGPT 接入 OpenClaw，GPT-5.4 养「龙虾」（保姆级教程）](knowledge/articles/wechat/wechat-article-别买_API_了_ChatGPT_接入_OpenClaw_GPT_5_4_养_龙虾__保姆级教程_-1773147971392.md)
- [Smart Model v2.0 开发记录](knowledge/archives/2026-03-12/smart-model-v2-development.md)
- [商业授权体系](knowledge/archives/2026-03-12/commercial-license-system.md)
- [双米粒协作系统](knowledge/archives/2026-03-12/dual-mili-collaboration-system.md)

- [2026-03-14 关键学习总结](knowledge/archives/2026-03-14/2026-03-14-lessons-learned.md)
- [2026-03-03 学习回顾与查漏补缺](knowledge/archives/2026-03/2026-03-03-学习回顾.md)
- [今日学习总结（2026-03-02）](knowledge/archives/2026-03/daily-summary-20260302.md)
- [2026-03-03 学习总结](knowledge/archives/2026-03/daily-summary-20260303.md)
- [系统深度优化报告（2026-03-03）](knowledge/archives/2026-03/system-optimization-20260303.md)
- [2026-03-03 查漏补缺清单](knowledge/archives/2026-03/review-checklist-20260303.md)
- [测试知识库初始化](knowledge/archives/2026-03/test-document.md)
- [2026-03-03 最终工作总结](knowledge/archives/2026-03/2026-03-03-最终工作总结.md)

- [QMD 知识库初始化](knowledge/README.md)
- [知识库索引](knowledge/INDEX.md)
- [本地语音识别部署研究（2026-03-03）](knowledge/local-speech-recognition-research.md)
- [系统问题清单模板](knowledge/旅行客平台/测试报告/问题清单模板.md)

- [阿里云百炼 API 配置](knowledge/api/bailian-api-configuration.md)
- [语音识别系统对比](knowledge/语音识别系统对比.md)
- [macOS 系统性能调优指南](knowledge/system-optimization/macos-performance-tuning.md)
- [外贸 SOHO 学习指南（2026 版）](knowledge/外贸-SOHO-学习指南.md)
- [知识库优化计划](knowledge/OPTIMIZE-PLAN.md)
- [Home Assistant 网络模式指南](knowledge/smart-home/home-assistant-network-mode.md)
- [Mosquitto 安全配置指南](knowledge/smart-home/mosquitto-security-configuration.md)
- [智能模型自动切换技能 v1.1.0](knowledge/ai-skills/smart-model-switch-v1.1.0.md)
- [引用前文内容读取技能 v1.0.0](knowledge/ai-skills/quote-reader-v1.0.0.md)
